MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER EMMA FAHY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Awards is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Petitioner to prepare and order and a judgment and submit them to the Court in accordance with CRC 3.1312.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
